emotional_tone: Authoritative, Clear, Functional, Data-dense, Professional Logistics

components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-gray-200), zero radius on mobile for full bleed or max 4px. Use tight internal spacing for data density (p-4).
components.buttons: Solid black for primary actions (Swiss style). Hover: bg-gray-900 text-white. Outline for secondary. Sharp corners or subtle rounding (rounded-md).
components.badges: Traffic-light coding. Green (Active), Yellow (Idle), Red (Offline). Use 1px border matching the text color with a very pale background (e.g., border-red-500 bg-red-50 text-red-700).
components.bottom_tabs: Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile feel. 4-5 core icons (Dashboard, Orders, Fleet, Profile). bg-white border-t border-gray-200.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard. Square or slightly rounded corners. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black.
components.lists: Use right chevron to indicate tap-to-view-details. Clear avatar or icon on the left. High contrast dividers (border-b border-gray-100).
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (phosphor-icons/react) for professional, technical, logistics look.

views_and_navigation.dashboard: Tiered KPIs bento grid. Top row: large numbers for revenue, active orders. Next: vehicle status, driver status. Mobile-first stacking.
views_and_navigation.orders: Filterable list with robust status badges. Details drill-down showing timeline/history.
views_and_navigation.live_tracking: Full-screen map view under a floating header and floating bottom sheet for active route details.
views_and_navigation.details_screens: Back button on top left. Content presented in data-heavy sections (e.g. Order Timeline, Customer Info, Vehicle Details) with clear 1px dividing borders.

logistics_hero.description: Black delivery truck on road, used for Auth/Login screen background.

map_placeholder.description: Road map placeholder for offline map views or static route previews.

build_instructions: Build a mobile-first Web App replicating the Fleetbase experience using React JS, Tailwind, and Shadcn/UI.
Set the root layout wrapper to simulate a mobile app container if viewed on desktop (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto h-screen relative bg-gray-50 overflow-hidden).
Implement bottom tab navigation consisting of: Dashboard, Orders, Fleet, Profile. Map can be inside Fleet or Dashboard.
Use standard data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (e.g. data-testid="login-button", data-testid="order-item-1").
Render the Map view using a static map image placeholder if no real map component is available, layered with floating UI panels for active tracking.
Ensure high information density and use of traffic-light status colors (Success=Green, Warning=Yellow, Error=Red).
Typography: Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Do not use generic Inter font for headings.
Load static dummy data to populate lists (Orders, Drivers, Vehicles, Routes, Places) to simulate a fully populated application.
Incorporate Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a professional, crisp technical aesthetic.
